subcodes.first_line: These are the days wherein neither pen nor tongue findeth rest or desireth aught save the remembrance of the martyrs [3.5s]... ...Payments for the Huququ'llah cannot be handed over to every person. These words have been uttered by Him Who is the sovereign Truth
subcodes.first_line_orig: این ایامیست که قلم و لسان جز بذکر شهدا ساکن نه و دوست نداشته و ندارد بذکری
subcodes.subjects: @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness, @martyrs and martyrdom, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @law of Huququ'llah, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice
